data.title: E1: Foundation & Scaffold
data.description: Structured errors (GravaError), zerolog, WithAuditedTx, concurrency primitives, cmd reorg into pkg/cmd/issues|graph|maintenance|sync, worktree resolver, testutil. Root epic — blocks all feature work.

data.title: 1.1: Core Error Types, Logging & Transaction Infrastructure
data.description: GravaError{Code,Message,Cause}, zerolog sole logger, WithAuditedTx tx wrapper, JSON Error Envelope, migration ownership fix (init-only).

data.title: 1.2: Concurrency Primitives & Coordinator Error Channel
data.description: WithDeadlockRetry (3 attempts, 10ms backoff), Notifier interface + ConsoleNotifier, Coordinator.Start() <-chan error, pkg/cmd reorganization.

data.title: 1.3: Worktree Resolver, Named Functions & Test Harness
data.description: GRAVA_DIR→redirect→CWD resolver, named functions claimIssue/importIssues/readyQueue, MockStore testutil, NewTestDB helper.

data.title: E2: Issue Lifecycle — Create, Track & Manage
data.description: create, quick, subtask, update, assign, start, stop, label, comment, drop, clear. All writes via WithAuditedTx. FRs: FR1-4, FR6-7.

data.title: 2.1: Create Issues and Macro-Epics
data.description: grava create --title --priority, 12-char hex ID, grava quick one-liner, JSON schema (NFR5), <15ms (NFR2).

data.title: 2.2: Break Issues into Subtasks
data.description: grava subtask <parent> --title, parent.sequence ID via SELECT FOR UPDATE on child_counters, atomic allocation.

data.title: 2.3: Update Issue Fields and Assign Actors
data.description: grava update --status --priority, grava assign --actor/--unassign, WithAuditedTx, INVALID_STATUS structured error.

data.title: 2.4: Track Work Start and Stop
data.description: grava start → in_progress + work_sessions entry, grava stop → paused, ALREADY_IN_PROGRESS/NOT_IN_PROGRESS errors.

data.title: 2.5: Label and Comment on Issues
data.description: grava label --add/--remove (issue_labels table), grava comment --message (issue_comments table).

data.title: 2.6: Archive and Purge Issues
data.description: grava drop → archived (excluded from list/ready by default), grava clear → hard delete purge, --force for in_progress, WithAuditedTx.

data.title: E3: Atomic Work Claiming & Ephemeral State
data.description: SELECT FOR UPDATE atomic claim, Wisp key-value ephemeral store (DB-persisted), issue progression history log. NFR3 owned. FRs: FR5, FR18-19.

data.title: 3.1: Atomic Issue Claim
data.description: grava claim <id> --actor: SELECT FOR UPDATE, verify assignee IS NULL, CLAIM_CONFLICT on race, <15ms NFR2.

data.title: 3.2: Write and Read Wisp Ephemeral State
data.description: grava wisp write/read, wisp_entries table with issue_id/key/value/written_by, updates wisp_heartbeat_at for doctor stale-agent detection.

data.title: 3.3: Retrieve Issue Progression History
data.description: grava history <id>: ordered event log (status changes, claims, wisp writes, comments), --since filter, crash-safe handoff context.

data.title: E4: Dependency Graph — Context-Aware Work Discovery
data.description: dep, ready, blocked, graph (dot|json|ascii), list, search, show, stats. Circular dep detection at write time. NFR1 deferred Phase 2. FRs: FR8-13.

data.title: 4.1: Establish and Remove Dependency Relationships
data.description: grava dep --add/--remove, WithDeadlockRetry, CIRCULAR_DEPENDENCY structured error at write time.

data.title: 4.2: Query the Ready Queue
data.description: grava ready: status NOT IN (done,archived) AND no active blockers, priority+created_at order, --limit, JSON array.

data.title: 4.3: Query Blockers for a Specific Issue
data.description: grava blocked <id>: upstream blocker list {id,title,status,assignee}, JSON array, ISSUE_NOT_FOUND error.

data.title: 4.4: Visualize the Full Dependency Graph
data.description: grava graph --format=dot|json|ascii, --root <id> subgraph, isolated nodes shown.

data.title: 4.5: Filter, Search and View Issues
data.description: grava list --status --assignee --priority filters, grava search full-text across title/description/comments, grava show full detail with subtasks+deps.

data.title: 4.6: View Workspace Metrics and Stats
data.description: grava stats: by status, blocked count, stale in_progress (>1h no heartbeat), avg cycle time, <100ms at 1K issues (Phase 1 baseline).

data.title: E5: Workspace Health & Maintenance
data.description: cmd_history, undo, compact, doctor (12 checks), doctor --fix with backup-before-purge safety protocol. FRs: FR14-17.

data.title: 5.1: Command History Ledger
data.description: grava cmd_history: cmd_audit_log table auto-recorded via WithAuditedTx, --limit/--actor filters, JSON array.

data.title: 5.2: Undo Recent State Changes
data.description: grava undo: revert via cmd_audit_log snapshot, --steps N, --dry-run, NOT_UNDOABLE error for hard deletes.

data.title: 5.3: Compact Stale and Deleted Data
data.description: grava compact: purge archived+expired wisp_entries+old audit_log, --dry-run, NFR2 regression benchmark.

data.title: 5.4: Doctor — Diagnostic Health Report
data.description: grava doctor: 12 checks (stale in_progress, orphaned branch, schema mismatch, coordinator, exclude entry, hook integrity, Dolt connectivity, wisp heartbeat, orphaned worktree, orphaned branch cross-ref, stale lock, expired reservation), read-only, exit 0/1/2.

data.title: 5.5: Doctor — Semi-Automatic Repair with Backup Safety
data.description: grava doctor --fix/--dry-run: backup-before-purge at .grava/backups/doctor-<ts>/, orphaned branch recovery (dirty→flag, clean→delete), structured repair report.

data.title: E6: Developer Onboarding — Zero-Friction Setup
data.description: Install scripts macOS/Linux (curl-pipe-sh) + Windows (PowerShell), OS/arch detection, Claude or Gemini CLI selection, grava doctor validation gate. FRs: FR26-28. NFR7+NFR8.

data.title: 6.1: Automated Install Script for macOS and Linux
data.description: curl-pipe-sh: OS/arch auto-detect, correct binary, Claude or Gemini CLI prompt+install, <5min (NFR7), idempotent (NFR8).

data.title: 6.2: PowerShell Install Script for Windows
data.description: PowerShell 5.1+, winget bootstrap, Windows x86-64 Grava binary, AI backend selection, <5min, idempotent.

data.title: 6.3: Install Validation via grava doctor
data.description: Final install step: grava doctor exit 0 = print success + 'Run grava init'; exit non-zero = actionable remediation commands.

data.title: E7: Git Sync — Export, Import & Hook Pipeline
data.description: grava export → issues.jsonl, grava import with Dual-Safety Check (all-or-nothing TX), post-merge + pre-commit hook stubs. NFR4 owned. FRs: FR20-21, FR24-25.

data.title: 7.1: Export DB State to JSONL
data.description: grava export: all non-archived issues + deps + wisp entries → .grava/issues.jsonl, --output path, 100% field preservation (NFR4), read-only.

data.title: 7.2: Import with Dual-Safety Check (All-or-Nothing)
data.description: grava import: JSONL hash vs Dolt state check, single TX (all-or-nothing), IMPORT_CONFLICT on uncommitted local changes, rollback on crash with safe-to-retry message.

data.title: 7.3: Register Git Hook Stubs (Idempotent)
data.description: grava init writes post-merge + pre-commit one-liner stubs; idempotent: appends with # grava-hook-start marker if hook exists, never silently overwrites.

data.title: 7.4: Automatic Sync on git pull via Post-Merge Hook
data.description: grava hook post-merge: detect issues.jsonl changed in merge → Dual-Safety Check → import pipeline; no-op if unchanged; hook failure advisory (non-blocking).

data.title: E8: File Reservation & Concurrent Edit Safety
data.description: grava reserve advisory leases (FR-ECS-1a, Phase 1), pre-commit hook enforcement (FR-ECS-1b, Phase 1). TTL auto-expiry + Git audit trail deferred Phase 2.

data.title: 8.1: Declare and Release File Leases (FR-ECS-1a)
data.description: grava reserve <path> --ttl --exclusive: file_reservations table {id,agent_id,path_pattern,exclusive,expires_ts,released_ts}, --list, --release, exclusive vs shared lease semantics.

data.title: 8.2: Pre-Commit Hook Enforcement (FR-ECS-1b)
data.description: grava hook pre-commit: check staged paths vs active exclusive leases, FILE_RESERVATION_BLOCK structured error with expires_ts; expired or non-exclusive leases do not block.

data.title: E9: Worktree Orchestration — Multi-Agent Isolation
data.description: grava init --enable-worktrees, claim+worktree+branch creation (grava/<agent>/<issue>), grava close atomic teardown, grava stop pause teardown. Coordinator manages Dolt lifecycle. NFR3 validated.

data.title: 9.1: Initialize Grava in Worktree Mode
data.description: grava init --enable-worktrees: writes worktrees_enabled=true, starts coordinator.Start() error channel, idempotent, NOT_A_GIT_REPO error.

data.title: 9.2: Claim an Issue with Worktree Creation
data.description: grava claim: base claim (Epic 3) + worktree at .grava/worktrees/<agent>/<issue>/ + branch grava/<agent>/<issue>; worktree rollback on failure; WORKTREE_CLEANUP_FAILED for doctor.

data.title: 9.3: Complete Work — Atomic Teardown with grava close
data.description: grava close: uncommitted-changes guard (UNCOMMITTED_CHANGES error), done transition, worktree+branch delete, file reservations release. --force to override.

data.title: 9.4: Pause Work — Atomic Teardown with grava stop
data.description: grava stop: warn on dirty (block without --force), paused transition, Wisp preserved, worktree deleted, branch KEPT for resume or doctor --fix cleanup.

data.title: E10: Advanced Merge Driver — Schema-Aware 3-Way Merge
data.description: grava-merge Git driver (%O %A %B), LWW per updated_at (Dolt NOW()), delete-wins policy, conflict_records table, Notifier alerts on unresolvable conflicts. FR22.

data.title: 10.1: SPIKE — Validate grava-merge Git Driver Invocation
data.description: Spike: grava-merge %O %A %B proof-of-concept, DB connectivity during merge hook confirmed, spike-reports/merge-driver-poc.md + CI sandbox scenario gate. ⛔ Blocks 10.2-10.4.

data.title: 10.2: Register grava-merge Driver and Parse 3-Way Input
data.description: .gitattributes: issues.jsonl merge=grava-merge (idempotent), .git/config driver= entry, 3-way JSONL parse keyed by issue_id, --dry-run merge plan output.

data.title: 10.3: LWW Resolution and Conflict Isolation
data.description: LWW via updated_at from Dolt NOW() (ADR-H1, never client clock), delete-wins policy → conflict_records, equal updated_at → conflict_records, Notifier.Alert(MERGE_CONFLICT).

data.title: 10.4: View and Resolve Conflicts
data.description: grava conflicts list/resolve --accept=ours|theirs/dismiss, resolved_status tracking (pending→resolved|dismissed), JSON schema NFR5.

data.title: E11: Sandbox Validation — Integration Gate
data.description: grava sandbox run CLI + 10 Phase 1 scenarios (TS-01..TS-10), progressive CI gate per epic. No checkbox theater — every story produces an executable artifact.

data.title: 11.1: grava sandbox run CLI (Prerequisite — blocks all scenario stories)
data.description: grava sandbox run --scenario=TS-XX --all --epic=N: JSON report, CI-invocable (no interactive prompts), SCENARIO_GATE_NOT_MET structured error.

data.title: 11.2: TS-01 — Basic Issue Lifecycle (Epic 2 Gate)
data.description: Scenario: create → update → label → comment → drop; structured JSON at each step; <30s; exit 0.

data.title: 11.3: TS-02 — Concurrent Atomic Claim (Epic 3 Gate)
data.description: Scenario: 2 concurrent grava claim same issue × 10 iterations; exactly 1 success, 1 CLAIM_CONFLICT; zero deadlocks.

data.title: 11.4: TS-04 & TS-07 — Export/Import Round-Trip and Conflict Detection
data.description: TS-04: export→clone→import 100% field+dep preservation (NFR4). TS-07: conflicting edits on two branches → merge → conflict_records populated + Notifier alert.

data.title: 11.5: TS-03/05/06/08/09/10 — Remaining Phase 1 Scenarios
data.description: All 10 Phase 1 scenarios pass. This story is the Phase 1 completion gate — prerequisite for Phase 2 sprint planning.
